heading: Limitations
body:
The following limitations apply to hybrid search using
`$rankFusion` and `$scoreFusion`:

- `$rankFusion` is only supported on MongoDB 8.0 and later (including latest
  version with auto upgrades). `$scoreFusion` is available on v8.2+.

  > **Note:** When you upgrade from 8.0, you might have to pause executing `$rankFusion`
  > queries.

- `$rankFusion` and `$scoreFusion` sub-pipelines can contain only the
  following stages:

  - [$search](pipe.$search)

  - [$vectorSearch](pipe.$vectorSearch)

  - [$match](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/match)

  - [$sort](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/sort)

  - [$geoNear](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/geoNear)

- `$rankFusion` and `$scoreFusion` preserve a traceable link back to
  the original input document for each sub-pipeline. Therefore, it
  doesn't support the following:

  - [$project](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/project) stage

  - [storedSource](fts-stored-source-definition) fields

- `$rankFusion` and `$scoreFusion` sub-pipelines run serially, not
  in parallel.

- `$rankFusion` and `$scoreFusion` don't support pagination.

- `rankFusion` can be run on [Views](manual/core/views) only on
  clusters running MongoDB 8.0 or higher. You can't run `rankFusion`
  within a view definition or on a time series collection.
